## Verified Rules Integrated into Python Project

### Duplicate Detection
- Composite key: `order_number + soldto` AND `pdf_hash`
- Final states: `SFTP_SUBMITTED`, `SENT`, `DELIVERED`
- `DB_Salesorder.csv.BSTNK` is comparison-only; NOT inserted into ledger `order_key`
- n8n DataTable IDs (reference): Customers=`hogSROnAz1CUwCcn`, Partners=`5hkYUqpxkfOftza9`, Materials=`SePUAQrQFc1bCOUp`, Ledger=`hnDkTv6vRuqUCCl5`

### Partner Matching Policy
- Postal exact match: primary evidence (+35 pts)
- City exact match: primary evidence (+30 pts)
- Street match: tie-breaker ONLY; street-only must never qualify
- Strong evidence requires postal exact OR city exact
- Minimum Sold-to confidence: 75
- Minimum Ship-to confidence: 80
- Unique gap >=15 required without strong evidence
- VAT normalization: strip spaces, punctuation, lowercase before comparison

### DEPT Derivation
- `DEPT = postal_code.digits[0:2]`, fallback `"NA"`

### Team Routing (ADV / Fonction Partenaire)
- TEAM 1: all material codes start with `'7'` AND none start with `'8'`
- TEAM 2: mixed or any code starts with `'8'`

### Canonical Rejection Codes
| Code | Description |
|---|---|
| `ORDER_KEY_MISSING` | No order number |
| `CONTRACT_KEYWORD` | PDF contains contract/quotation keywords |
| `NO_VALID_ARTICLE` | No valid article/material lines |
| `CONTRACT_BREAK_ADDRESSES_MISSING` | Address block incomplete |
| `DUPLICATE_ORDER` | Already submitted |
| `UNKNOWN_MATERIAL` | Article not resolved to MATNR |
| `DISCONTINUED_MATERIAL` | MATNR in discontinued list |
| `ROH_NONCOMMERCIAL` | MATNR is ROH type |
| `SFTP_UPLOAD_FAILED` | SFTP delivery failed |
| `SOLDTO_LOW_CONFIDENCE` | Sold-to match < 75 |
| `SOLDTO_AMBIGUOUS` | Tied Sold-to candidates |
| `SHIPTO_LOW_CONFIDENCE` | Ship-to match < 80 |
| `SHIPTO_WEAK_EVIDENCE` | Street-only match rejected |
| `SHIPTO_AMBIGUOUS` | Tied Ship-to candidates |

### EDIFACT Generation Rules
- Message: ORDERS D.96A
- UNA: `UNA:+.? '` (constant)
- UNB: `UNOC:3 + 4399901876613 + 3015981600108` (ELM_STANDARD, immutable)
- UNH reference: `1`
- BGM+220 constant
- DTM+137 from PDF order date
- NAD+BY from `10564_Customers.csv` (SOLDTO)
- NAD+DP from `10564_Partners.csv` (SHIPTO)
- LIN increments by 10
- PIA+5 = resolved SAP MATNR
- IMD+A = PDF description, fallback to material master
- QTY+21 PCE
- PRI+AAA only when unit price present
- CNT+2 = line count
- UNT = accurate segment count
- UNZ control ref = UNB control ref

### Material Resolution Priority (POMPAC)
1. EAN lookup (`lookup_ean_to_material.csv`)
2. Fourre-tout lookup (`lookup_fourretout_to_material.csv`)
3. Direct MATNR match vs `10564_Materials.csv`
4. Fuzzy description match (min 65% token overlap)
5. Reject: `UNKNOWN_MATERIAL`

### Environment Variables Required
- `SFTP_HOST`
- `SFTP_USERNAME`
- `SFTP_PASSWORD` or `SFTP_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH`
- `SFTP_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSPHRASE` (optional)
- `SFTP_REMOTE_DIR`

2. ADV Contact Table placeholder ID requires manual n8n API lookup
3. `10564_Materials.csv` was flagged missing in some deployment contexts - verify path
4. SMTP `dry_run` may still be enabled in production config
5. `DB_Salesorder.csv.BSTNK` MUST NOT be inserted into ledger `order_key`
